CHAR 2 x x
GG0170S2_WHEEL_150_GOAL_CD GG0170S2 Mobility: Goal to Wheel at Least 150 Feet by Discharge Indicates the patient's goal to wheel the wheelchair or scooter at least 150 feet in a corridor or similar space by discharge. 06. Independent – Patient completes the activity by him/herself with no assistance from a helper.
05. Setup or clean-up assistance – Helper sets up or cleans up; patient completes activity. Helper assists only prior to or following the activity.
